## Summary
<what changed and why>

## Spine impact
- [ ] No spec change (code/docs only)
- [ ] Additive spec change (new optional key/edge type/example)
- [ ] Breaking spec change (requires version bump — explain below)

## Conformance
- [ ] `node conformance/validate.mjs conformance/sample.json` passes
- [ ] All example connectors still self-certify (`node connectors/*/connector.mjs`)
- [ ] New tests added under `test/` if behavior changed

## Checklist
- [ ] Updated `hub/REGISTRY.md` if adding/changing a connector entry
- [ ] Updated `spec/connective-spine.md` changelog if the spec changed
